Title: KENNEDY SPACE CENTER, FLA. -  Representatives from the Shuttle program and contractor team are part of Center Director Jim Kennedy’s first all-hands meeting for employees. From left are Kennedy, Bill Pickavance, Mike Wetmore and Bert Garrido.   They were on hand to discuss the Columbia Accident Investigation Board report and where KSC stands in its progress toward return to flight.
